_comment: Single source of truth. Edit raw facts here; the tools derive true cost, transfer tax, collateral and scores from these fields via lib.js. Scores are holistic judgments kept as data; true_cost / tax are computed, never hand-typed.

factors.name: Renovation posture
opts: Mixed — some big items still ahead

penalties.name: Flat felt roof, due / failing
penalties.cap: by material + condition, not age alone

properties.name: Strömsintie 23 A
properties.timing: Available now — needs a bridge or buy-before-sell. Won't wait for your 2027 window.
properties.gate: Highest-scored and closest to the ideal profile — own land, two-storey zone separation, roof done, professional mgmt, walk-to-beach, school confirmed. Pivotal unknown: the takkahuone wall rakenneavaus. Clean → strong buy; moisture/rot in the 1989 frame → reprice or walk.
flags: Own land; 7-unit company, professional management
Two-storey, bedrooms both floors — the layout you want
Roof done; €3,511/m² fair vs Marjaniemi comps
Electric heating; 1989 wood frame

properties.name: Linnalahdentie 12
properties.timing: Available now — bridge or buy-before-sell. Lease-2055 also caps a 30-yr term.
properties.gate: Lease runs to 2055 (~29 yr). Helsinki renews residential ground leases as a matter of course — so this isn't renewal risk. The open question is the rent reset at 2055 (priced off plot value × the city's return rate, estimable now) and how a sub-20-yr remaining term reads to a buyer if you sell near the end of your hold. Ground rent €1,986/yr → ~€57k capitalised.
flags: HRV ventilation; extensively renovated 2018–26; move-in ready
Verified-measured 2020; kuntotarkastus 3/2026
Small 475 m² plot; C energy

properties.name: Kiviportintie 26
properties.gate: Near-new (2023) on own land with geothermal + HRV and a 0.4 km walk to both Vartiokylä ala-aste and Botby — top-tier on systems and school with effectively zero renovation risk. Catch: a hallinnanjakosopimus shares the plot and entry drive with one neighbour. Verify those terms and any remaining build warranty.
flags: 2023 build; maalämpö + floor heating; HRV; B energy
Own land via hallinnanjakosopimus (shared driveway, 1 neighbour)
Two-storey, 3 beds up + work room down — zone separation
High €/m² (~€4,800); 3% transfer tax (kiinteistö)

properties.name: Ison-Antintie 17 B
properties.timing: Completes Aug–Sept 2027 — dovetails with your sale. No bridge, minimal double-carry (construction-phase financing aside).
properties.gate: Turnkey new-build (A reserved). Zero renovation risk, A-energy, HRV, heat pump, own land, school 150 m. Off-plan: permit ~Sept 2026, completion ~Sept 2027, you sign as rakennuttaja under RYS-9. Delivery risk replaces renovation risk — and the timing lines up with your 2027 sale.
flags: A2018, HRV, air-water heat pump, pitched metal roof
Own land via hallinnanjakosopimus (3 houses)
Transfer tax 3% on €200k plot only (~€6k)
Not yet built/permitted — contract & completion are the gate

properties.name: Paasitie 15 A
properties.gate: Linjasaneeraus + maalämpö just completed, cost NOT yet jyvitetty. €510k excludes it — a 132 m² share of a full pipe+geothermal job could be €60–120k+. This one number decides it. (reno_share below is a placeholder low-end €60k.)
flags: Private water — own shore, boat slips, beach (a bonus, not a gate)
Own land; maalämpö; Fluxio / Toivo Tapaila managing
Flat felt roof on 1978 stock — your penalty
Exhaust-only vent; upstairs WC not renovated

properties.name: Orvokkitie 5 b
properties.gate: Strongest freehold all-rounder, but a hallinnanjakosopimus (2010) shares the plot with a second house. Confirm the agreement terms and SR-3 restrictions.
flags: Major works done 2024 (roof, windows, pipes); IVLP 2026
Freehold; school 0.6 km, metro 0.6 km
Gravity vent; SR-3 protection
Heating pipes original; asbestos survey needed

properties.name: Varjakanvalkama 16
properties.gate: Strong in-area family house — Vartiokylä, own land, 157 m² over three levels with genuine zone separation (master down, beds up, family room), a durable tile roof, a sensible €448/mo vastike, and the marina + swimming beach a short walk away. The drags: electric heating (17,000 kWh/yr) with no energy certificate issued yet (likely D/E), a 9-unit resident-run company, €4,045/m², and the garage is a separate €20k share. Own land leaves the door open to retrofit ground-source later.
flags: Vartiokylä; own land; 157 m², 3-level, master down + beds up — real zone separation
Tile pitched roof; low €448/mo vastike; walkable marina + beach
Electric heat 17,000 kWh/yr; no energy certificate yet (pending); mech vent, HRV unconfirmed
9-unit resident-run management; garage a separate €20k share; €4,045/m²

properties.name: Myllyväenkatu 1
properties.gate: Modern, low-risk, professionally managed, cheapest of the strong group. Leased to 2070; ground rent is inside the €803/mo vastike (so not capitalised here), headline ≈ true cost.
flags: 2016, hyvä, B energy, district + floor heating
Pro management; school 0.9 km
Leased but resale fine to ~2050
Shared yhteistila obligation

properties.name: Valssimyllynkatu 19 G 2
properties.gate: A 2023/24 new-build that ticks the structural boxes the leased Myllypuro options miss: the company owns its plot AND carries no debt (no rahoitusvastike), so the low €478/mo vastike is real. HRV, B energy, pitched metal roof, school 0.8 km, professional management — essentially zero renovation risk. The price is the cost: €4,523/m², the steepest in Myllypuro, and the balcony faces north-east.
flags: 2023/24, own land, DEBT-FREE company — low €478/mo vastike
HRV (tulo+poisto+LTO); B energy; district heating; metal roof
Myllypuro; school 0.8 km, daycare 0.6 km, Raide-Jokeri
High €/m² (~€4,523); NE balcony aspect; 16-unit; not Hitas (free resale)

properties.name: Rihlakuja 5
properties.gate: Stone-built detached, own land, €2,621/m² — strong value. But surfaces largely original and the 12/2025 kuntotarkastus flags wet-room reno, a moisture trace, ground-slope/waterproofing. That report is the line between value buy and money pit.
flags: 190 m², own land, district + floor heating
School 500 m; metro ~1 km
Two-unit self-managed company
Wet rooms + moisture items ahead; vent unconfirmed

properties.name: Mamsellimyllynkatu 13
properties.gate: Newest of the existing buildings, lowest reno risk — but leased at €4,327/yr to 2075. Paid directly to the city, so capitalised (~€124k) the own-land-equivalent is ~€671k, priciest modern on a true-cost basis.
flags: 2012, maalämpö, B energy; backs onto protected forest
Small 305 m² plot
Lease 2075 — far enough not to bite resale

properties.name: Hallainvuorentie 14 A
properties.gate: 2003 paritalo, hyvä shell, professionally managed, schools 0.6–1.2 km, district heating + ILP. But kitchen and bathrooms are largely original 2003 (renovation due in your hold), the €738/mo vastike is high, and the land is leased to 2062 (rent inside the vastike). Plus 56 m² basement on top of the 104 m² living area.
flags: Myllypuro; schools + daycares 0.6–1.2 km
104 m² living + ~56 m² basement (takkahuone, sauna)
Original 2003 kitchen/baths; mechanical vent (HRV unconfirmed)
Leased 2062; high vastike; 4-unit company, residents do upkeep

properties.name: Myllyväenkatu 10 J
properties.gate: Modern 2013 paritalo, biggest of the Myllypuro modern set (140 m²), professionally managed, 10-yr builder inspections already done. Two structural caveats: it's HITAS (Helsinki caps the resale price — a real drag on a 10–20 yr hold), and it's on leased land to 2070 with a €1,001/mo vastike (ground rent is inside that). Read what the vastike actually buys.
flags: 2013, hyvä, B energy, district + floor heating; two-storey
Professional mgmt; 10-yr rakennuttaja inspections done 2023–24
HITAS — resale price-capped by the city
Leased 2070; very high €1,001/mo vastike; mech vent (HRV unconfirmed)

properties.name: Paasitie 9 C
properties.gate: Own land, professionally managed, big-ticket work done. But valesokkeli moisture corrections run across the company unit by unit — confirm whether C is implicated. Reno-loan jyvitys ~€5.4k.
flags: Own land; isot remontit done; park-bordering end unit
78 m² is small for a growing family
Gravity vent; D energy; valesokkeli risk

properties.name: Pyötsaarenkuja 4
properties.gate: Best school proximity — daycare 50 m, schools 800–900 m, new Vartiokylä school 2028. Recently renovated. But the garage→bedroom conversion has no permitted käyttötarkoituksen muutos — confirm before it's a financing/resale snag.
flags: Own land; recent big works; kuntotarkastus 2/2026
Electric heat (ILP); D energy; high €/m²
Two-unit self-managed
Unpermitted garage→bedroom conversion (the gate)

properties.name: Marjaniementie 22 A
properties.gate: Headline 166 m² overstates it — huoneistoala 132 m², so real €/m² ~€3,500. Four-unit self-managed company with split old/new liability concentrates capex/governance risk.
flags: Own land 1,209 m²; 2-car garage in price
Exhaust vent only
2022 plumbing was relining, not full renewal
Pientalo build expected across the street

properties.name: Lappeentie 34
properties.gate: Freehold, 154 m² on 1,208 m² with extension rights, €3,029/m². Pipes 2024, roof 2014, kuntotarkastus 11/2025. But a 1949 core expanded twice, tyydyttävä, electric heat + gravity vent + E energy — more work and higher running cost. The 11/2025 report on the core is the gate.
flags: Freehold; 154 m² + 241 m² rakennusoikeus
Pipes 2024, roof 2014; kuntotarkastus 11/2025
Electric central heat; E energy; ~€210/mo
Gravity vent; 1949 core under extensions

properties.name: Arhotie 8 a
properties.gate: Freehold with maalämpö (2019) and roof (2020) done, fresh kuntotarkastus 6/2026 to read. But a rintamamiestalo with 2004 surface-run plumbing and a satisfactory rating — the ongoing-need profile typical of the type.
flags: Freehold; ground-source heat
Small 500 m² plot; SR-3
2004 pintaveto plumbing; satisfactory

properties.name: Humikkalantie 58 B 1
properties.gate: Modern and clean on the framework — 2021, own land, HRV, air-water heat pump, B energy, very low running cost. The real gate is location: Mellunkylä/Kontula sits OUTSIDE your named peninsulas, so it breaks Lumi's catchment. Also note the 156 m² headline is only 106 m² living + 50 m² garage/tech.
flags: 2021 stone build; HRV; heat pump; €105/mo heating
Own land, 6-part määräosa (hallinnanjako)
106 m² living (156 incl. garage/tech)
Off your peninsula list — Mellunmäki metro 1.5 km

properties.name: Pyörökiventie 23 B
properties.gate: Big (199 m²) coastal-Tammisalo end unit on own land, interior renovated 2014–17 and windows 2024. But it's a 1971 flat-felt-roof house with electric heat + D energy (16,700 kWh/yr), no HRV (the company expects you to add it), and the 2023 kunnossapitoselvitys lists facade + insulation, balcony concrete and roof renewal ahead — a 4-unit self-managed company where each owner carries their own structure.
flags: 199 m², own land, Tammisalo coastal; two-storey zone separation
Interior pipes/electrics/wet rooms 2014; windows 2024
Flat felt roof on 1971 + electric heat + D energy; no HRV
Facade/balcony/roof works ahead; 4-unit self-managed (per-unit liability)

properties.name: Myllyväenkatu 12 G
properties.gate: Sister company to Myllyväenkatu 10 J — 2014, hyvä, professionally managed (Granlund), 3-level läpitalo. Same two drags: HITAS resale cap and leased land to 2070 with a high €775/mo vastike. Smaller and pricier per m² than 10 J (€3,719/m²), a €100k company loan limit was authorised in 2025, and some rotten support posts are being repaired — worth checking on a 2014 build.
flags: 2014, hyvä, B energy, district heat; two-storey
Professional mgmt (Granlund)
HITAS — resale price-capped; leased 2070; €775/mo vastike
€100k company loan authorised 2025; some post rot being repaired

properties.name: Rautapaidantie 8 C
properties.gate: Cheapest own-land two-storey in the set (€2,931/m²), hyvä, well-maintained, rinnetontti zone separation. But it runs on direct electric heat (suorasähkö, E energy, 12,000 kWh/yr), exhaust-only vent, a cement-fibre roof, and a 4-unit self-managed company. Radon was elevated and corrected in THIS unit (C) in 2022–23, and the lower school is 2 km — weaker catchment than the Marjaniemi/Vartiokylä-core options.
flags: Own land; cheap €2,931/m²; two-storey zone separation; well-maintained
Direct electric heat + E energy — high running cost
Exhaust vent; cement-fibre roof (pitched, not flat felt); 4-unit self-managed
Radon corrected in this unit 2022–23; lower school 2 km

properties.name: Virvatulentie 6 A 10
properties.gate: Striking, character-rich Marjaniemi end unit — 151 m², a 7 m glass-roofed living room, schools and the beach nearby, lease long to 2096. But the running cost is the problem: a €1,193/mo total vastike (incl. korjausvastike) is almost a second mortgage, it's HITAS (resale capped), the felt mono-pitch roof is due for renewal in 2028 (penalty by condition, not age), vent is exhaust-only, and the unit is currently tenanted (3-month notice).
flags: Marjaniemi; 151 m²; unique 7 m glass-roof living room; two-storey
Lease to 2096 (long, fine); schools + beach near
HITAS; very high €1,193/mo vastike; felt roof renewal 2028
Exhaust vent; D energy; currently rented (3-mo termination)

properties.name: Harbonkatu 7 C
properties.gate: Beautifully sorted — fully renovated 2017, B energy, seam-metal roof, own land, district heat, professional management, and the best water of anything in the set: private shore right, company beach sauna, jetty and boat slips. But it sits in Ramsinranta (Vuosaari), outside your peninsulas, so it breaks Lumi's catchment; it's only 2 bedrooms + an office; and at €4,929/m² it's the priciest per square metre here. The area also carries radon (mitigation system in place).
flags: Fully renovated 2017; B energy; seam-metal roof; district heat; own land
Best water in the set — private shore, beach sauna, jetty, boat slips
Off your peninsulas (Vuosaari/Ramsinranta) — breaks the school anchor
Only 2 beds + office; €4,929/m² (highest here); radon area (mitigated)

properties.name: Rantakiventie 10 E
properties.gate: Sea-view rivitalo on own land with no company debt — but Vuosaari (Vartiolahti) is outside your peninsula list and breaks the school anchor, and the listing is thin (no condition report, ventilation, or renovation history given). Treat the sea view as the only confirmed plus until you see the documents.
flags: Sea view; own land; debt-free company; district heating
Off-anchor — Keski-Vuosaari, not your target areas
1977 stock; flat-roof era — confirm roof/structure
Sparse listing — condition/vent/renos undisclosed

properties.name: Mäntypaadentie 17 C
properties.gate: Own land, reno mostly behind (roof 2015, facade 2025, windows 2026), 20-unit professional management — good bones. Drag: €300/mo rahoitusvastike on top of €320 maintenance, lifting total carry to €650/mo. At €5,500/m² for 100 m², it’s the priciest per-square-metre on the list — check what the special assessment covers and when it ends.
flags: Own land; Asunto Oy Gretanpuistikko, 20u, Kontu Isännöinti
Reno mostly behind: roof 2015, facade 2025, windows 2026
€300/mo rahoitusvastike — confirm term and outstanding balance
District heat + exhaust vent; 1977 frame — check insulation and moisture
